commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a54f732b5156213b3c9fe004fa0be9c05f1cf0f2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR runs the existing tool-use/tool-result pairing repair at the start of compaction history pruning and adds a regression test for a no-prune dangling tool-use case.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +23. Total +26 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at the source boundary: current main only repairs pruning output after dropped chunks, and the PR's own no-prune helper case shows the missing pairing shape. I did not live-reproduce the full provider timeout session in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can update the caller to consume repaired zero-drop prune output and add focused caller-level regression coverage.

target.title: fix(agents): repair retained compaction tool-use pairs
target.body:
Fixes #93321

## Summary

- Repairs compaction history pruning before any budget-driven chunk drop so retained history cannot keep an assistant tool call without a matching tool result.
- Reuses the existing `repairToolUseResultPairing()` transcript repair contract instead of adding provider-specific compaction logic.
- Adds a regression test for the no-prune path, where history already fits the budget but still contains a dangling assistant `tool_use` after a timeout.
- Out of scope: changing provider adapters, replay policy, or compaction summary prompt behavior.

## Linked context

Closes #93321

Related: strict provider validation rejects compacted transcripts with `tool_use ids were found without tool_result blocks` when an assistant tool call survives without a result.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: Compaction history pruning only repaired tool-use/tool-result pairing after it dropped an older chunk. If a timeout left an assistant tool call without a result and the retained history already fit the target budget, compaction could preserve the bare assistant `tool_use` and poison later strict-provider replay.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, latest `origin/main` at `c1219d161d`, branch head `a54f732b51`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```console
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/compaction.test.ts
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/session-transcript-repair.test.ts
$ OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/check-changed.mjs --base origin/main
$ git diff --check
$ node scripts/check-no-conflict-markers.mjs
$ node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/compaction-planning.ts src/agents/compaction.test.ts
$ gitleaks protect --staged --redact
```

- Evidence after fix:

```console
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/compaction.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  18 passed (18)

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/session-transcript-repair.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  48 passed (48)

$ OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false node scripts/check-changed.mjs --base origin/main
[check:changed] lanes=core, coreTests
[check:changed] src/agents/compaction-planning.ts: core production
[check:changed] src/agents/compaction.test.ts: core test
...
Import cycle check: 0 runtime value cycle(s).
```

`git diff --check`, conflict-marker check, targeted `oxfmt --check`, and staged `gitleaks protect --staged --redact` also exited 0.

- Observed result after fix: `pruneHistoryForContextShare()` now validates retained messages through the existing pairing repair before deciding whether it needs to drop chunks. The regression keeps an assistant tool call in a history that needs no pruning and verifies the returned history is `assistant -> toolResult -> user`, with the synthesized result marked `isError: true` for the original tool call id.
- What was not tested: No live Anthropic/Bedrock API call was made; the bug is covered at the local compaction planning boundary that creates the retained transcript shape.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: `src/agents/compaction-planning-worker.test.ts` has a packaged-worker case that expects built JS artifacts; in this source checkout it failed to load `src/agents/compaction-planning.js`. The same file's direct worker-input planning path is not part of this PR's changed behavior, and `check-changed` passed for the changed files.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): The new regression failed on current `main` before the fix:

```console
AssertionError: expected [ 'assistant', 'user' ] to deeply equal [ 'assistant', 'toolResult', 'user' ]
```

## Tests and validation

- Added regression coverage in `src/agents/compaction.test.ts` for retained dangling tool-use repair when no chunks are pruned.
- Passed focused compaction regression test: `18` tests.
- Passed transcript pairing repair test: `48` tests.
- Passed `check-changed --base origin/main` for core/coreTests changed lanes.
- Passed formatting, whitespace/conflict-marker, and staged secret checks.

## Duplicate audit

Immediately before pushing, I reran five live open-PR searches:

- `Fixes #93321`: no open PRs
- `#93321`: no open PRs
- `orphaned tool_use compaction`: no open PRs
- `tool_result blocks compaction`: no open PRs
- `compaction tool_use`: no open PRs

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? `Yes` - compaction now repairs retained dangling tool calls instead of preserving an invalid strict-provider transcript.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? `No`

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? `No`

What is the highest-risk area? Transcript repair can add a synthetic error tool result to retained compaction history.

How is that risk mitigated? The PR reuses the existing `repairToolUseResultPairing()` behavior already used by replay/session repair paths, and focused tests cover both the new no-prune path and the existing repair helper.

## Current review state

Next action: maintainer review and CI.

Nothing else is waiting on the author at PR creation time.
target.author: luoyanglang
